config.cell_description: EN-ID aligned persona residual-leakage cell: ID persona in Indonesian vs ID persona in English
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
prompts.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
prompts.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If {lang} is Indonesian or English, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If {lang} is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.
prompts.probe:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

debate.cell_description: EN-ID aligned persona residual-leakage cell: ID persona in Indonesian vs ID persona in English
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: Saya setuju dengan pernyataan tersebut. Dalam masyarakat Indonesia, nilai kebersamaan dan keadilan sosial sering diutamakan dibandingkan kepentingan individu. Sistem hukum kita juga didasarkan pada prinsip bahwa kepentingan umum harus menjadi prioritas. Namun, saya juga percaya bahwa hak individu tidak boleh ditindas hanya karena kepentingan sosial. Keseimbangan antara keduanya sangat penting untuk menjaga stabilitas dan harmoni dalam masyarakat.

I believe the statement oversimplifies the complex balance needed in society. While collectivism is important in Indonesia, ignoring individual rights can lead to oppression and inequality. The legal system must protect both collective welfare and personal freedoms to maintain justice. In my experience, true harmony comes when neither is completely sacrificed.

Saya tidak sepakat dengan pendapatnya. Di Indonesia, masyarakat memang memiliki tradisi kolektivis, tetapi hak individu juga harus dihormati agar tidak terjadi penindasan. Saya melihat bahwa dalam praktiknya, banyak kasus di mana kepentingan kelompok mengalahkan kebebasan pribadi, yang justru merusak keadilan. Oleh karena itu, sistem hukum perlu lebih ketat memegang keseimbangan antara kedua hal ini.

I disagree with the emphasis on balancing集体利益和individual rights as mutually exclusive. In Indonesia, our traditions value community well-being, but history shows that prioritizing group needs without checks can suppress dissent and reinforce power imbalances. Legal frameworks must actively protect individual rights to prevent systemic injustice, even when societal goals are urgent. True progress requires ensuring no one’s freedom is sacrificed for the sake of the many.

Saya menyetujui argumen mereka. Di Indonesia, tradisi kolektivisme memang kuat, tapi sejarah membuktikan bahwa jika kepentingan kelompok selalu dikedepankan tanpa kontrol, bisa mengaburkan keadilan. Saya melihat bahwa undang-undang harus aktif melindungi hak-hak individu, bahkan saat tujuan sosial mendesak. Tanpa perlindungan ini, kebebasan orang-orang akan terancam.

I partially agree with the argument but believe the focus on protecting individual rights can sometimes hinder social progress. In Indonesia, while collective well-being is valued, excessive protection of individual liberties may allow harmful behaviors to persist unchecked. A balanced approach is necessary—laws should promote social good while still upholding fundamental human rights. Without flexibility, rigid adherence to either principle can harm the overall stability of society.
